text: A red suitcase being pulling out of frame by a hand.
A woman and a dog tussle over a frisbee.
An orange motorcycle is parked next to a car.
A clock reflection shows a woman with an umbrella.
An ambulance driving by a family of three.
Two women cooking on stove in a kitchen together.
Three giraffes can be seen in zoo enclosures.
Firefighters standing next to two firetrucks near some tree.
Boats are floating in a lake by the mountains.
A cat standing on top of a wooden bench near a field.
